content.title: All 13 Section Types — Fixture
content.subtitle: One row covering every renderer. Use in Storybook or a dev route to verify visual parity.

sections.heading: Markdown
sections.body:
# Heading One

Some paragraph text with **bold** and _italic_ for visual weight.

- bullet one
- bullet two

> Pull quote style line.

items.title: Discovery complete
items.body: All 3 tenants audited, architectural incompatibility flagged.

items.q: Should we fold paamon_* tables into a generic action_items?
items.rationale: Collapsing loses meaning; template accepts per-tenant custom tables as a feature.

items.q: Phase C full port vs minimal viable?
items.rationale: Preserves Erez's OS entirely; meeting transcripts + naming + everything.

items.text: Align with Atlas on useAuth() shim

sections.heading: Open questions
items: Do the paamon_* custom tables need per-column transforms, or just 1:1 copy?
Should the KB renderer support inline editing in phase 1, or stay read-only until phase 2?

items.title: Why TRUNCATE before INSERT?
items.body: Idempotency. New tenants land with zero rows post-provisioning. TRUNCATE makes the migration re-runnable without accumulating duplicates. The pre-flight --force check prevents accidental wipes.

items.title: Why manifest-driven instead of tenant-specific scripts?
items.body: We have 3 tenants today and probably more later. One engine + N JSON manifests means every safety improvement (transactional inserts, chunked batches, etc.) applies everywhere automatically. Per-column transforms plug into the same shape.

items.position: Build KB renderer in Daniel first, hoist to template later
items.for: Smaller blast radius for mistakes. Atlas doesn't block us.
items.against: Risk of template drift if we ship to Daniel before Atlas's template exists.

speakers.name: Erez
speakers.line: For Daniel, for the OS, for Flame King, all the oldest structured pages need to come into the new dashboard structure. 100% needs to be migrated.

speakers.name: Jarvis
speakers.line: Binding directive — no Option 2/3 trimming. Full port.

speakers.name: Noa
speakers.line: Ack. Revising timeline. OS-merged back to 2-3 weeks honest estimate.
